result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 19:          EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) ...
                                                   ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH ch AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         createddate,
         oldvalue__c,
         newvalue__c,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM ch
  WHERE cnt = 1 AND rn = 1
), cases_4mo AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         nt.ownerid,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN not_transferred nt ON nt.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
), agent_stats AS (
  SELECT ownerid,
         COUNT(*) AS case_cnt,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM cases_4mo
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid AS id
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         createddate,
         oldvalue__c,
         newvalue__c,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM ch
  WHERE cnt = 1 AND rn = 1
), cases_4mo AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         nt.ownerid,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN not_transferred nt ON nt.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
), agent_stats AS (
  SELECT ownerid,
         COUNT(*) AS case_cnt,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM cases_4mo
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid AS id
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         createddate,
         oldvalue__c,
         newvalue__c,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM ch
  WHERE cnt = 1 AND rn = 1
), cases_4mo AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         nt.ownerid,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN not_transferred nt ON nt.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
), agent_stats AS (
  SELECT ownerid,
         COUNT(*) AS case_cnt,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM cases_4mo
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid AS id
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         createddate,
         oldvalue__c,
         newvalue__c,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM ch
  WHERE cnt = 1 AND rn = 1
), cases_4mo AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         nt.ownerid,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN not_transferred nt ON nt.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS case_cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT ownerid) AS agent_cnt
FROM cases_4mo;

args.query:
SELECT MIN(createddate::timestamp) AS min_created,
       MAX(createddate::timestamp) AS max_created,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases
FROM "Case";

exec_args.sql:
SELECT MIN(createddate::timestamp) AS min_created,
       MAX(createddate::timestamp) AS max_created,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases
FROM "Case";

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         createddate,
         oldvalue__c,
         newvalue__c,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cases_with_owner_history,
       SUM(CASE WHEN cnt=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cases_not_transferred,
       SUM(CASE WHEN cnt>1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cases_transferred
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT case_id, cnt FROM ch) x;

exec_args.sql:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         createddate,
         oldvalue__c,
         newvalue__c,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cases_with_owner_history,
       SUM(CASE WHEN cnt=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cases_not_transferred,
       SUM(CASE WHEN cnt>1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cases_transferred
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT case_id, cnt FROM ch) x;

args.query:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         createddate,
         oldvalue__c,
         newvalue__c,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c ORDER BY createddate) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM ch
  WHERE cnt = 1 AND rn = 1
), cases_4mo AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         nt.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN not_transferred nt ON nt.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
), agent_stats AS (
  SELECT ownerid,
         COUNT(*) AS case_cnt,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM cases_4mo
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ownerid AS id
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH ch AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         createddate,
         newvalue__c,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caseid__c) AS cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
), not_transferred AS (
  SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM ch
  WHERE cnt = 1
), cases_4mo AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         nt.ownerid,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN not_transferred nt ON nt.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM cases_4mo
GROUP BY ownerid
ORDER BY case_cnt DESC, avg_handle_seconds ASC;

result.preview: "No agent qualified (in the past 4 months, every non-transferred closed case was handled by a different agent, so no agent processed more than one case)."

args.answer: No agent qualified (in the past 4 months, every non-transferred closed case was handled by a different agent, so no agent processed more than one case).
